text.title: Clean Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the arch-pattern-clean methodology end-to-end.

step.name: identify-entities
step.action: List bounded-context entities; mark value objects vs aggregates.

step.name: identify-use-cases
step.action: List use cases that operate on entities; one method per use case.

step.name: design-adapters
step.action: For each external concern (HTTP, DB, queue), design an adapter that converts to/from use case DTOs.

step.name: wire-frameworks
step.action: Frameworks (FastAPI, SQLAlchemy) live in infrastructure/; they call adapters, not domain.

step.name: enforce-direction
step.decision-gate: If lint not available for stack, block — adopt one before rolling out the pattern.
